headline: DECKERS OUTDOOR CORP (NYSE:DECK) Checks the GARP Box with Zero Debt and a PEG Ratio of 0.58
summary: Discover the GARP investment strategy with Deckers Outdoor (DECK), a Peter Lynch-style pick showing 25.68% EPS growth, a PEG ratio of 0.58, zero debt, and strong financial health for long-term wealth creation.
